creator: mhjacks@swbell.net
text:
On 9/21/2010 10:31 PM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net-mgmt/rubygem-snmp,
>
> Please note that PR ports/150838 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/150838
>

Approved.  Thanks for your time and contribution!

Marty
